news.summary: In March, Super Micro Computer, Inc. has become the most heavily shorted large-cap security amidst escalating worries over U.S. tariffs and tech industry instability. According to Hazeltree's Shortside Crowdedness Report, there has been a significant shift away from tech investments. The report showed a decrease from eight to five in the number of top 10 most crowded shorted large-cap securities from February to March. Hazeltree, a prominent player in active treasury management, highlighted these trends as the industry navigates through increasing uncertainties.
news.headline: Super Micro Computer is the most crowded shorted large-cap security in March, with sector rotation out of tech.

news.summary: In Denver, Spruce Power Holding Corporation (NYSE: SPRU) revealed the appointment of Chris Hayden as Senior Vice President of IT and Enterprise Applications. Hayden, joining the leading distributed solar energy assets company in the US, will enhance Spruce's service platform, expand the Spruce PRO service, and lead innovation in the IT department covering strategy, infrastructure, and application development.
news.headline: Spruce names Chris Hayden as Senior VP of IT and Enterprise Applications, to enhance service platform and drive innovation.
Fed's Williams: Inflation expectations are important to watch right now.
Fed's Williams: It's really hard to say what Fed will do with rate policy.
Fed's Williams: Market pricing reflects uncertainty about outlook.
Fed's Williams: My basic views on monetary policy haven't fundamentally changed.

news.summary: In Milwaukee, Badger Meter, Inc. (NYSE: BMI) announced its first quarter results for the period ending March 31, 2025. The highlights of the first quarter of 2025 include reaching total sales of $222.2 million, marking a 13% increase compared to the previous year's $196.3 million. Operating earnings saw a significant uptick of 35% year-over-year to $49.5 million. Operating profit margins also expanded by 360 basis points, growing from 18.6% to 22.2%. Diluted earnings per share (EPS) rose by 31%, reaching $1.30 compared to $0.99 in the same quarter of the prior year. Additionally, they successfully completed certain undisclosed business activities during this period.
news.headline: Badger Meter (BMI) reports strong Q1 2025 results: Total sales $222.2M (+13%), operating earnings $49.5M (+35%), EPS $1.30 (+31%).

news.summary: ADS-TEC Energy, a renowned company in battery-based energy storage and fast-charging systems (NASDAQ: ADSE), will showcase its newest products and services at the Power2Drive trade fair in Munich from May 7 to 9, 2025. Located at Hall B6, Booth 210, the company will present innovative solutions such as the ChargePost, ChargeBox, and the new large-scale Battery Energy Storage System (BESS). Based in Nürtingen, Germany, ADS-TEC Energy is known for its cutting-edge EV charging technologies and is set to exhibit its multifunctional fast EV charging solutions at the event.
news.headline: ADS-TEC Energy to showcase innovative products at Power2Drive trade fair in Munich from May 7-9, 2025. Leader in battery-based energy storage and fast charging systems. Booth 210, Hall B6. $ADSE.

news.summary: A new entrant named MAP Medical has recently launched operations in Chicago on April 17, 2025, with the aim of revolutionizing healthcare product supply chains. This innovative company focuses on offering top-notch medical supplies at affordable prices, striving to enhance efficiency in the industry. Their goal is to provide quality products while keeping costs low, catering to the needs of healthcare facilities. This development showcases a significant step towards improving access to essential medical supplies, potentially impacting many institutions in the healthcare sector.
news.headline: New company MAP Medical aims to streamline healthcare product supply chains by providing high-quality, affordable medical supplies. Launching officially on April 17, 2025 in Chicago.

news.summary: The noteworthy exhibition is one of 12 global displays commemorating the 100th anniversary of the Leica I camera. The Leica Store & Gallery in New York City is excited to announce the showcase of 100 YEARS OF LEICA, honoring the centennial milestone of the iconic camera.
news.headline: Leica Store & Gallery NY showcases "In Conversation" with Bruce Davidson and Sara Messinger, part of 100 YEARS OF LEICA exhibit.

news.summary: In Oakland Park, Florida on April 17, 2025, GK Hair, a prominent company in the haircare sector, is encouraging individuals to enhance their styling regimen with its high-quality selection of hair products. Offering options for achieving smooth, refined styles as well as full-bodied, textured looks, GK Hair's line of styling products is designed to cater to a variety of preferences.
news.headline: GK Hair offers premium styling products for all hair types, helping achieve sleek or voluminous styles.

news.summary: Nearly a quarter (24%) of Americans are abandoning intentions to make significant purchases, like homes or cars, due to the impact of President Trump's recent tariff regulations, as per a report from Redfin (www.redfin.com), a tech-based real estate firm. Furthermore, 32% are postponing such plans. These findings were based on a survey commissioned by Redfin and conducted by Ipsos from April 10-14, 2025, representing the nation as a whole. The report was released via NASDAQ under the code RDFN.
news.headline: 24% of Americans are canceling plans to make a major purchase due to tariffs; 32% are delaying plans: Redfin survey
Fed's Williams: Tariffs will drive up inflation this year and lower growth.

news.summary: In Newport Beach, California, FundingShield's Q1 2025 Wire Fraud Risk Report reveals that approximately 50% of mortgage transactions are facing potential risk. The report indicates heightened regulatory and Government-Sponsored Enterprises (GSEs) scrutiny on controls to address this alarming statistic.
news.headline: FundingShield reports Q1 2025 wire fraud risk in mortgage transactions; Nearly 50% at risk. Regulators/GSEs enhance scrutiny.
Fed's Williams: Monetary policy is in the right place.
Fed's Williams: It is time to collect data and understand what's going on.

news.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc., the global leader in scientific services, has unveiled its Advanced Therapies Collaboration Center (ATxCC) in Carlsbad, Calif. The cutting-edge facility aims to speed up the progress and release of cell therapies. Its focus is on aiding biotech, biopharma, and translational clients in creating cell-based immunotherapies. The center facilitates collaboration, offering support to developers in the cell therapy field. Through this initiative, Thermo Fisher aims to boost innovation and commercialization in this sector.
news.headline: Thermo Fisher Scientific opens Advanced Therapies Collaboration Center in Carlsbad to accelerate cell therapy development.
Fed's Williams: Monetary policy is well positioned, doesn't see need to change rates any time soon.
Fed's Williams: The economy is in a very good place amid uncertainty - Fox Business.

news.summary: In Jericho, New York, on April 17, 2025, Esquire Financial Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: ESQ) revealed that Esquire Bank, National Association will now be included on S&P Global. This financial holding company oversees Esquire Bank, and the announcement marks a significant achievement for the institution.
news.headline: Esquire Bank named Best-Performing U.S. Small Community Bank of 2024 by S&P Global Market Intelligence.

news.summary: A group of ex-athletes is aiming to revolutionize athlete management by providing personalized guidance for players during and after their careers. The team, comprised of individuals who have experienced the athlete journey firsthand, seeks to redefine the traditional role of athlete managers. By offering a holistic approach tailored to each athlete, they hope to provide them with more options and support throughout their playing and post-playing endeavors.
news.headline: FreeGame launches athlete management group run by former athletes, offering personalized career guidance.

news.summary: Moleculin Biotech, Inc., a pharmaceutical company traded on Nasdaq under MBRX, shared news today that their abstract on Annamycin, a next-gen anthracycline aimed at challenging cancers and viruses, will be presented at the American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) Annual Meeting 2025. The event, scheduled for April 25-30, 2025, at Chicago's McCormick Place Convention Center, will feature Moleculin's research. This signifies a significant opportunity for the company to showcase their late-stage drug candidates to experts and peers in the field.
news.headline: Moleculin to present abstract on Annamycin at AACR Annual Meeting 2025 in Chicago on March 25-30.

news.summary: Leviathan Gold Ltd. has commenced the first phase of shallow mechanical trenching at its Foča Project in Republika Srpska, Bosnia and Herzegovina. This initiative aims to identify near-term drill targets. The project follows a successful induced polarization and electrical resistivity survey at the Vrela Prospect. The trenching will be conducted upslope from an area with high-grade silver, lead, and zinc samples collected by the company in 2024. Leviathan Gold Ltd. operates with the stock symbols LVX on the TSXV and 0GP on the Germany exchange.
news.headline: Leviathan Gold starts trenching at Foča Project, Bosnia and Herzegovina, after successful survey. aims to define drill targets.

news.summary: Three investments were recently made in existing portfolio companies, totaling $50.7 million in funded loans. These investments reflect the continued support and growth opportunities within the portfolio.
news.headline: Runway Growth Finance Corp. updates Q1 2025 portfolio with $50.7 million in funded loans across 3 existing investments.

news.summary: A company specializing in healthcare enablement, Brighton Health Plan Solutions, was recognized for the third consecutive year as a 2025 USA Today Top Workplace. The accolade is based on employee feedback, gathered through a comprehensive evaluation process. This marks the third time the company has received this honor, showcasing their commitment to a positive workplace environment.
news.headline: Brighton Health Plan Solutions named a 2025 Top Workplace by USA Today for the third year in a row based on employee feedback.

news.summary: In Escondido, California on April 17, 2025, One Stop Systems, Inc. (Nasdaq: OSS), a renowned provider of rugged Enterprise Class compute solutions for AI, ML, and edge sensor processing, released a shareholder letter discussing its accomplishments in 2024 and outlook for 2025. The letter highlights the company's advancements in the aforementioned fields and its strategic goals for the coming year.
news.headline: One Stop Systems, Inc. CEO and Chairman issued a letter to shareholders, highlighting company progress in 2024 and expectations for 2025. (Numbers: April 17, 2025, Nasdaq: OSS)

news.summary: In Broomfield, Colorado, on April 17, 2025, Crocs, Inc. disclosed plans for a conference call on May 8, 2025, at 8:30 am ET, to review its first-quarter results for the period ending March 31, 2025. The company, listed on NASDAQ as CROX, invites interested parties to register for the conference call to obtain specific details.
news.headline: Crocs, Inc. (NASDAQ: CROX) to host conference call on May 8, 2025, at 8:30 am ET to discuss first quarter 2025 results.

news.summary: NANO-X IMAGING LTD, based in Petach Tikva, Israel, revealed today the approval of its Nanox.ARC X multi-source digital tomosynthesis system by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA). The swift FDA 510(k) clearance came in under 30 days from submission and extends to producing tomographic images for diverse applications in adult patients. This includes the human musculoskeletal system as well as pulmonary, intra-abdominal, and paranasal sinus conditions, enhancing conventional radiography practices. The Company, listed on Nasdaq as NNOX, continues to advance its innovative medical imaging technologies.
news.headline: Nanox gets FDA clearance for new Nanox.ARC X imaging system for general use in less than 30 days.
Stephen Jones joins 374Water's Board of Directors as a key appointment.
Birchtech will showcase at Planet MicroCap on April 23, 2025.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, UEC Corp, trading on NYSE American as UEC, based in Corpus Christi, Texas, announced that Amir Adnani, the Founder, President, and CEO of the company, has been selected to join the World Nuclear organization. Uranium Energy Corp specializes in uranium mining.
news.headline: Amir Adnani of Uranium Energy Corp appointed to World Nuclear Association Board. Madrid, SP (April 17, 2025)- NYSE: UEC.

news.summary: A recent collaboration has broadened DarioHealth Corp's reach to employers, boosting recurring revenues in the first quarter of 2025. This partnership marks a significant move for Dario, a top player in the digital health sector. The company, listed as Nasdaq: DRIO, is based in New York.
news.headline: DarioHealth teams up with national benefits plan, boosting employer reach. Q1 2025 sees revenue growth. (Words: 74)

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, in Langhorne, Pennsylvania, TEN Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: XHLD), a company specializing in event planning, production, and broadcasting services, announced that it has been selected as the official technical webcast provider for a prominent accounting and consulting firm. TEN Holdings is proud to offer its expertise in webcasting services to enhance the firm's virtual events.
news.headline: TEN Holdings helps consulting firm with global broadcasts, ensuring zero downtime. Proud to be trusted partner.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, in New York, a recent report emphasizes the significance of the underlying platforms for Augmented Reality (AR) and Virtual Reality (VR) devices, often overshadowed by the devices themselves. The global technology intelligence firm ABI highlights that these platforms play an equal or even more vital role. This insight showcases the crucial role platforms play in enabling the seamless functionality of AR and VR devices, with ABI providing key industry analysis and forecasts.
news.headline: New AI-first devices are sparking growth in the AR and VR market, making platforms a key battleground with increasing opportunities.

news.summary: Galmed Pharmaceuticals, listed on Nasdaq as GLMD, has recently partnered with Virginia Commonwealth University (VCU) through a Sponsored Project Agreement. The collaboration aims to assess the impact of Aramchol in combatting drug resistance in gastrointestinal (GI) cancers. Aramchol, a pioneering SCD1 inhibitor, will undergo thorough examination to determine its potential effectiveness in this area. The study will involve a comprehensive analysis of the drug's capabilities and could potentially lead to innovative treatments for GI cancers.
news.headline: Galmed Pharmaceuticals partners with VCU to study Aramchol in GI cancers for drug resistance. Nasdaq: GLMD.

news.summary: Three companies have joined forces to improve document generation and cloud storage for regulated industries. MHC, a prominent provider of document automation and workflow SaaS solutions, unveiled the collaboration on April 17, 2025. This strategic partnership aims to enhance efficiency for high-volume document processing.
news.headline: MHC partners with Micro Strategies Inc to streamline document generation for regulated industries.

news.summary: Nanalysis Scientific Corp. will be hosting a call at 5:00 pm ET on Thursday, April 24th, followed by a European Q&A session on Friday, April 25th at 8:30 am ET. The Company, trading under TSXV: NSCI, OTCQX: NSCIF, FRA: 1N1, and headquartered in CALGARY, AB, announced these events. Known for its advancements in portable NMR instruments and imaging technology, Nanalysis Scientific Corp. continues to lead in this sector as of April 17, 2025.
news.headline: Nanalysis to host conference calls for Q4 and full year 2024 results on April 24th and Q&A session on April 25th. TSXV: NSCI, OTCQX: NSCIF, FRA: 1N1 mentioned.

news.summary: In 2024, internet advertising revenues experienced robust growth, rising by 14.9% compared to the previous year. This growth was driven primarily by digital video, retail media, search, and social advertising. These sectors saw the strongest gains in internet advertising revenue since 2021. The analysis, conducted by PwC, indicated a significant upsurge in the industry, highlighting the increasing importance of online platforms for advertisers.
news.headline: 2024 saw a 15% YoY increase in digital ad revenue, reaching $259B, driven by digital video, retail media, search, and social.

news.summary: AMETEK, Inc. (NYSE: AME) has announced that they will be releasing their first quarter 2025 earnings before the market opens on Thursday, May 1, 2025 in BERWYN, Pa. The announcement was made on April 17, 2025. The release will be accompanied by a webcast of their first quarter 2025 results.
news.headline: AMETEK will release Q1 2025 earnings before market opens on May 1, 2025, with a webcasted investor conference call.

news.summary: In KFAR SAVA, Israel, on April 17, 2025, Silicom Ltd. (NASDAQ: SILC), a prominent supplier of networking and data infrastructure solutions, revealed that a current client, a US-based global leader in advanced network testing equipment solutions, had...
news.headline: Silicom's high-speed server adapter chosen by global network test equipment giant for next-gen offering. Characters: 97

news.summary: On April 17, BJ's Restaurant & Brewhouse introduced a new dessert featuring SNICKERS® filling, vanilla ice cream, chocolate cone coating, caramel sauce, and SNICKERS® pieces. This treat is now available for guests to indulge in. The event took place in Huntington Beach, California, marking the return of the restaurant chain. The company's stock is listed on NASDAQ with the ticker symbol BJRI.
news.headline: BJ's Restaurant partners with Mars to launch SNICKERS® Pizookie® on April 17, filled with SNICKERS® and topped with ice cream.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, in Ontario, California, Nature's Miracle Holding Inc. (OTCQB:NMHI), a prominent company specializing in vertical farming technology, revealed that its common shares have been given authorization for trading on the OTC Markets Group Inc.'s OTCQB platform.
news.headline: Nature's Miracle Holding Inc. joins OTCQB markets as leader in vertical farming tech; common shares approved for trading.

news.summary: ESGold Corp., based in Vancouver, British Columbia, revealed on April 17, 2025, that the on-site construction and assembly have begun at its Montauban Gold-Silver Project in Quebec. This development marks a significant step forward for the Company as it shifts towards implementing its short-term production plan. The Company trades under the tickers CSE: ESAU, OTCQB: ESAUF, and FSE: Z7D.
news.headline: ESGold Corp. starts construction at Montauban Gold-Silver Project in Quebec, moving towards production.

news.summary: A new report has revealed that the global economy is expected to grow by approximately 5.6% in the next year, following a 3.5% contraction in 2020 due to the COVID-19 pandemic. The recovery is projected to be uneven across different regions, with advanced economies forecasted to grow by about 4.3%, while emerging and developing economies expected to see a growth of around 6.3%. Despite this overall positive outlook, there are concerns about rising inflation rates and disparities in vaccine distribution that could hinder the economic recovery process. In addition, global trade is projected to increase by nearly 8% in the upcoming year, boosting economic growth in many countries. Overall, while there are promising signs of recovery on the horizon, challenges remain that could impact the pace and sustainability of economic growth in the near future.
news.headline: MAGFAST collects over $10M through various offerings on Netcapital for product development.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, Medallion Financial Corp. (NASDAQ: MFIN) revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2025, after the market shuts on Wednesday, April 30, 2025. Medallion Financial Corp., functioning as a distinct finance entity, administers loans across diverse consumer and commercial sectors, in addition to loan products facilitated through fintech affiliations. This announcement is of significance to investors following the Company's progress and is to be released on a specific date for public access.
news.headline: Medallion Financial Corp. (NASDAQ: MFIN) to report Q1 2025 results on April 30, 2025. Specializes in various loans and fintech.
David Dugas has been appointed President and COO of UAV Corp.

news.summary: A strategic partnership was unveiled today between AI-powered cybersecurity software and compliance services provider CISO Global (trading as NASDAQ: CISO) and cyber insurance specialist Cyber Assurance Group Inc. The collaboration introduces CyberSimple, a novel initiative catering to small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs) seeking comprehensive cyber resilience and financial protection. This unique solution converges advanced cybersecurity safeguards with tailored financial coverage, ensuring peace of mind for business owners.
news.headline: CISO Global partners with Cyber Assurance Group to introduce CyberSimple- providing cybersecurity protection for SMBs in $50 billion insurance market.

news.summary: A report released today by CompoSecure, Inc. revealed that metal payment cards are driving growth for financial institutions. The independent global survey conducted by Capuchin Behavioural Science indicated that these cards are particularly popular among wealthier and younger consumers. CompoSecure, a leading provider in metal payment cards, security, and authentication solutions, commissioned the survey. Results showed a significant impact on the industry, with numbers reflecting a notable increase in usage among these demographics.
news.headline: CompoSecure survey shows metal payment cards boost bank growth, targeting high-value customers. Study by Capuchin Behavior Science.

news.summary: Batavia, Illinois - On April 17, 2025, High Wire Networks, Inc. revealed a promising beginning to the first quarter of 2025. The company, known for its managed cybersecurity solutions, saw a positive trend highlighted by increased support and participation from partners within its channel network. These victories in Q1 underscore the growing harmony with High Wire - Overwatch’s combined approach, presenting partners with streamlined, powerful cybersecurity services that can expand rapidly, ensuring steady, repeatable income.
news.headline: High Wire Networks, Inc. had a successful Q1 in 2025, with renewed partnerships driving momentum, offering cybersecurity services for recurring revenue.

news.summary: Norman E. Snyder, Jr. is set to retire as CEO, with Cyril Wallace stepping in to take over both CEO and Director roles. Additionally, Ruud Bakker will be joining the Board of Directors. This transition marks a significant change in leadership for the company and is part of a strategic move to bring in new perspectives. The retirement of Snyder, Jr. comes after years of service to the company, during which he oversaw substantial growth. Wallace's appointment brings fresh leadership to the company, while Bakker's addition to the board will further diversify and strengthen the company's governance. This announcement comes amidst a time of growth for the company, with revenues reaching [insert revenue amount] in the last fiscal year.
news.headline: Reed's CEO Norman E. Snyder, Jr. retires, Cyril Wallace new CEO. Ruud Bakker joins board.
